title: AIDABench: AI Data Analytics Benchmark
acquisition_purpose: Commit-pinned official-release acquisition for review-aidabench-end-to-end-artifact-validity. This record is not a deep review or release audit.

paper.extraction_status: The non-empty extraction is continuous across the title and abstract, main text, results and future-work sections, references, appendices, and final page. This continuity check is not a deep review.

official_repository.identity_evidence: The immutable paper PDF links this repository in the abstract, and the acquired README identifies itself as AIDABench and links arXiv:2603.15636.
official_repository.archive_test: passed: Python ZipFile CRC test returned no corrupt member
official_repository.license_status: No license is declared by the GitHub repository API and no LICENSE, COPYING, or NOTICE file exists in the pinned archive. The README displays an Apache-2.0 badge linking to a nonexistent LICENSE path. Reuse rights therefore remain unverified and must not be inferred from the badge.
official_repository.static_inventory: The archive contains 49 Python files, 50 Markdown files including 47 SKILL.md files, six evaluator modules, four evaluation runners, five consensus modules, 13 agent files, and one XLSX toolkit file. It contains no test-named file and no bundled data/, dataset/, or datasets/ payload; download_data.py points to external dataset acquisition. No code, model call, benchmark workload, or downloaded-data script was executed.
official_repository.timing_boundary: The pinned commit postdates arXiv v2 by about 89 days. Acquisition establishes the requested current release snapshot, not byte identity with the code, data, configurations, or result artifacts used for the paper.

acquisition_scope: Existing immutable-v2 PDF/text were integrity-checked and inspected for extraction continuity; the requested official repository commit archive and GitHub metadata were downloaded, hashed, CRC-tested, and statically inventoried without execution.
claim_boundary: This evidence supports a later full-paper and release audit. Acquisition alone does not establish dataset completeness, paper-release correspondence, evaluator validity, result reproducibility, analytical quality, professional validity, configured-system capability, procurement utility, or readiness.
